title: cineraria glandulosa
intro: Cineraria glandulosa, also known as Cape marigold or blue marguerite, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cineraria glandulosa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, which can lead to improved overall health and well-being. Cineraria glandulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health.
